mapper.select: SELECT task_id, company_id, checklist_id, task_template_id, title, description, status, due_date, assigned_user_id, assigned_department_id, completed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_at, require_ack, acknowledged_at, acknowledged_by, requires_manager_approval, approval_status, approved_by, approved_at, rejection_reason, approver_user_id FROM task_instances WHERE due_date >= #{fromDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND due_date <= #{toDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND (status IS NULL OR upper(trim(status)) != 'DONE') ORDER BY due_date ASC
